response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and demonstrable technical depth across languages and systems, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, or direct AI innovation at scale — key requirements for this principal engineer role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Deep full-stack fluency across diverse languages (DLang, TS, Node, C++) and infrastructure
Strong track record of technical teaching and community contribution via workshops and tools
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy experience shown
Lacks documented leadership in large-scale AI systems or direct cloud provider expertise
Education lacks advanced AI-related degree; experience is broad but not focused on AI strategy
